title: Design System: The Good Opal Co

headline.purpose: Section anchors and major page headings.

shadows.name: elevation-low
shadows.purpose: Small cards, badges, and quiet affordances.

shadows.name: elevation-medium
shadows.purpose: Product cards, drawers, menus, and purchase panels.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main commerce action with restrained opal gradient and strong focus state.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 44px; padding: 10px 24px; border: 0; border-radius: 9999px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #00B4D8, #0077B6); color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 180 216 / 0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgb(0 180 216 / 0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #005A87; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Quiet supporting action for secondary navigation and low-risk commands.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { min-height: 44px; padding: 10px 24px; border: 0; border-radius: 9999px; background: transparent; color: #2C2C2C; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgb(44 44 44 / 0.05); color: #005A87; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #005A87; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: White gallery surface for product imagery and fast commerce facts.
components.html:
Lightning Ridge Opal Ring

Sterling silver setting

AUD 420
components.css: .ds-product-card { overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #E8E6E3; border-radius: 12px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #2C2C2C; box-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-product-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-product-image { aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F8F7F6, #E8E6E3); } .ds-product-body { padding: 16px; } .ds-product-body h3 { margin: 0 0 4px; font-family: EB Garamond, Georgia, serif; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.25; font-weight: 600; } .ds-product-body p { margin: 0 0 12px; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, serif; font-size: 14px; color: #6B6966; } .ds-product-body strong { font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, serif; font-size: 16px; color: #2C2C2C; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Compact transactional field with clear focus and neutral surface.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, serif; color: #2C2C2C; } .ds-field span { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-field input { height: 40px; border: 1px solid #E8E6E3; border-radius: 6px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #2C2C2C; padding: 8px 12px; font: inherit; font-size: 14px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #005A87; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgb(0 90 135 / 0.2); }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Quiet pill navigation with opal underline state.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 40px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 9999px; color: #2C2C2C; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 16px; right: 16px; bottom: 6px; height: 2px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #00B4D8; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { color: #005A87; outline: none; } .ds-nav-link:hover::after, .ds-nav-link:focus-visible::after { transform: scaleX(1); }

narrative.northStar: The Opal Gallery in the Bush
narrative.overview: The interface should feel like entering a small, warm Australian opal gallery: intimate, handmade, sunlit, and trustworthy, with moments of iridescent magic only where they help the stone feel alive. Product photography, origin details, price, stock, shipping, returns, and authenticity cues have priority over decorative chrome.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream, white, charcoal, and opal accent flashes.
Serif-led editorial hierarchy with readable body text.
Accessible ecommerce controls with visible focus and clear states.
Magical details used as punctuation, not wallpaper.

rules.name: The Stone First Rule
rules.body: If color treatment competes with product photography, remove the color treatment.

rules.name: The Accessible Opal Rule
rules.body: Electric Opal is for fills and accents. For text on white, use Accessible Opal Deep.

rules.name: The Accent Restraint Rule
rules.body: Dancing Script is only for emotional moments such as success pages, taglines, and celebrations.

rules.name: The No Card Nesting Rule
rules.body: Do not put UI cards inside other cards unless the inner item is a repeated product, order, or line item with a clear semantic role.

dos: Do use Impeccable as a critic and shaping workflow for meaningful UI work.
Do use product photography, macro image quality, and image framing as the primary design asset.
Do keep trust badges close to the price, cart, checkout, and shipping decisions.
Do provide empty, loading, error, overflow, hover, focus, disabled, and mobile states for commerce components.
donts: Don't use generic AI-generated landing page composition.
Don't use purple-blue SaaS gradients as the dominant visual identity.
Don't create card grids inside card grids.
Don't add decorative gradient orbs, bokeh backgrounds, or abstract glows as default atmosphere.
Don't use dark, blurred, cropped, or atmospheric imagery when users need to inspect the actual opal.
